report.summary: Production still frozen on Apr 2 commit (e3f63fc). 166 uncommitted files (145 untracked). 109 new pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES in uncommitted diff. Build crashes with bus error in sandbox (likely OOM — not indicative of Vercel). 141 TS errors across 4 files (non-blocking). All 6 API routes structurally sound; defi-yields still lacks in-memory fallback. Deploy debt now 2+ days — 35th escalation.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript check: 141 errors across 4 files — lido-v3-stvaults-guide (94), structured-data.examples.ts (40), crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide (4), rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison (3). Non-blocking: ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts.
Published pages audit: 741 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (committed). 109 additional pages in uncommitted diff across 8 publish cycles (Apr 3–4). Total pending: 850 slugs.
Missing page.tsx audit: 109 phantom slugs in committed PUBLISHED_PAGES still lack page.tsx files. Known backlog — no regressions.
Recently added pages from last commit (14 learn guides + stablecoin-yield-tracker): all present, no 'use client' + metadata export conflicts detected.
Local build: crashes with 'Bus error (core dumped)' — sandbox memory limitation, not a code issue. Vercel builds with 8GB heap should succeed (ignoreBuildErrors:true covers TS errors).
No new regressions detected since last cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API route files present and structurally sound: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields.
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s/10min), trending (300s/5min), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s/5min), defi-yields (300s/5min).

Fallback data: market-dominance has hardcoded fallback. prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics use stale cache fallback. defi-yields delegates to @/lib/defillama with no in-memory fallback — still the most fragile route.
Cache-Control headers: All routes set appropriate s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate. Consistent pattern across all routes.
Rate limiting: health route uses checkRateLimit. Other routes do not apply rate limiting — existing known gap.
Egress blocked in sandbox — cannot verify live API responses. Code review only this cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: e3f63fc (Apr 2, 2026). Production frozen for 2+ days.
166 uncommitted files in working tree: 21 modified, 145 untracked. Includes 109 new published page promotions, OG image updates, new learn guides, tool enhancements, report files.
Local build crashes with bus error (sandbox OOM). Vercel should handle with 8GB heap + standalone output + staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4.
Cannot reach degen0x.com or Vercel dashboard from sandbox — egress blocked. No live performance or error data available.
No rollback needed — last deployed commit was stable. Risk is solely deploy debt (new content not reaching production).
BLOCKER: Jefe must commit + push to trigger Vercel deploy. 35th escalation.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE LAST EOD (v7): Multiple agent runs across build, publish, community, design skills. 109 new pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES in uncommitted changes across 8 publish cycles.

TODAY'S OUTPUT: New learn guides (Onchain CLOBs, Crypto Prime Brokerage, + others from earlier cycles), 5+ publish promotions, community content (tweets, newsletter), OG image updates for market-recap, risk-score, sentiment-heatmap, token-radar.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (35TH ESCALATION): Deploy debt critical. 166 uncommitted files. Production frozen since Apr 2. All new content, publish promotions, and OG images invisible to users. Institutional narrative content (Prime Brokerage, Onchain CLOBs) losing freshness.
P1 — QUEUE STATUS: 7 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE (committed). With uncommitted changes, queue may be further depleted. 2 queue pages still lack page.tsx (monad, zora).
P2 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 109 phantom slugs (missing page.tsx), 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking), defi-yields API fragility, 0/6 routes with rate limiting.
P3 — CARRY-OVER: defi-yields hardening, scaffold monad-guide + zora page.tsx, resolve phantom slugs batch.
